product.description:
• Cross Thresholds and Barriers: X50 Ultra utilizes robotic retractable legs to conquer door tracks, thresholds, and obstacles up to 2.36 in. It uses shocker absorbers and other innovations to minimize impact and noise to delivery a quieter cleaning experience.
• Easily Clean Under Sofas and More: VersaLift Navigation lowers X50 Ultra height to 3.5 in, allowing it to navigate under furniture easily. The AI camera with LED guidance in tight spots ensures precise navigation and obstacle avoidance.
• Restore Your Home without Tangles: Tackle hair tangles by managing long hairs up to 11.8 in with the new DuoBrush system. Its air duct design flings and sucks up hair while using two separate brushes to provide a quiet, deep clean to floors.
• Attack Dust with Quiet Suction: Up to 20,000Pa Vormax suction is powered by our sixth-generation TurboForce motor, X50 Ultra delivers large pickup, including cat litter, crumbs, and more. Pair standout suction with our quiet-focused fluid-dynamic design for a peaceful, thorough clean.
• Tackle Messes in Corners: X50 Ultra extends both brush and mop to reach corners and low spaces under furniture. The redesigned brush minimizes hair tangling, ensuring a thorough clean in areas most vacuums miss.
• Proper Care for Your Carpets: Five tailored modes allow you to take better care of your carpets. Remove mops, avoid carpets, and boost suction are just a few of the many options you have to customize your clean for spotless, protected results.
---
Our warranty is applicable for 2 years from the date of delivery that is tracked and recorded by Dreame Singapore. For Dreame after-sales service:
• Address: 81 Ubi Ave 4, #01-03, Singapore 408830
• Service Centre Contact: +65 8807 2989 (WhatsApp only)
• Your order details will serve as proof of purchase for warranty.

product.description:
D20 ULTRA FEATURES:
13,000Pa Powerful Vormax Suction Power - First in Industry
• Newly breakthrough in sweeper revolution. Remarkable vacuuming, enhanced carpet & rug cleaning! Bye Hair, Bye Dirt, Bye Dust!
---
All-in-One PowerDock[TM] - Hot Air Drying and Mop Washing - Exclusive
• Streamline your daily cleaning and come home to freshly cleaned floors that smell and feel great. Keep your robot in top shape with auto-emptying, mop washing, and mop drying. After each mop wash, hot air drying prevents odors, mold, and dampness. Keeps your brush dry, fluffy, and always ready to clean-no stink, no mildew, no worries.
---
100 Days Hands - Free Dust Disposal - Exclusive
• Equipped with DualBoost[TM] 2.0 and a large 3.2L dust bag, it auto-empties thoroughly and resists clogging-so you don’t have to touch the dust for up to 100 days. Clean home, zero effort.
---
RoboSwing[TM] Mopping - Exclusive
• The RoboSwing[TM] mop swings side to side like it's got moves, wiping dust and grime from corners, edges, and awkward angles-all without you lifting a finger.
---
DuoScrub[TM] Double Mops - Exclusive
• Two high-speed rotating mops apply downward pressure to scrub away tough stains, spills, and dirt-leaving your floors spotless and gleaming with less effort.
---
Cleaning Features
• Suction Power: D20 = 13,000Pa
• Robot Vacuum Dimensions: 35 x 35 x 10.4 cm (D20)
• Base Station Dimensions: 34 x 45.7 x 59 cm (D20)
• Dust Bag Capacity: 3.2L (Up to 75 days)
• Obstacle Crossing Height: 20mm
---
Mopping features
• Clean / Used Water Tank Capacity: 4.5L / 4.0L
• Auto Mop Wash / Hot Air Dry: Yes
• Auto Water/Detergent Refill: Yes
• Auto Mop Lifting: Yes (10.5mm*)
• Auto Side Brush Lifting: Yes (10mm*)
• Battery Capacity: 5,200mAh Fast Charging
• Voice Control: Only supported with third-party applications

product.description: As with all Kärcher products, the bagless VC 3 Plus multi-cyclone vacuum cleaner features outstanding functionality. With its elegant design and practical size, the VC 3 Plus fits perfectly into the modern Asian family home. Easy to use, it is suitable for both young and older people. The highly efficient multi-cyclone vacuum cleaner offers consistent high power without loss of suction and, thanks to the washable waste container, it saves you a great deal of money that you would otherwise have to spend on replacement filter bags. The transparent waste container enables you to see the vacuumed dirt, and therefore also the powerful cleaning effect, at a glance. HEPA 12 filters with minimal dust emissions ensure extremely clean air – ideal for allergy sufferers. What's more, the VC 3 Plus is particularly quiet, making it extremely family-friendly. The Kärcher VC 3 Plus cleans floorsand carpets just as thoroughly as gaps, corners, edges and other hard-to-reach areas.

product.description:
OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping Technology (16x more cleaning pressure).
• The DEEBOT T80 OMNI features the OZMO ROLLER Instant Self-Washing Mopping Technology to deliver a more powerful mopping experience, effectively scrubbing and removing stains from the floor with a mopping pressure intensity of 3,700 Pa—more than 16 times* the pressure of leading dual-plate mopping and vibrating flat mopping technologies currently available on the market. Clean water is returned to the mop to keep it fresh after wastewater is scraped off. With up to 200 rpm rolling speed, this equates to 200 high-speed scrubbing and rinsing actions per minute, effectively preventing streaks and cross-contamination. With a smaller contact area, the mop applies more concentrated pressure to achieve a significant cleaning effect on stains.
---
TruEdge 2.0 + TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor.
• The upgraded TruEdge 2.0 allows the roller mop to extend dynamically during edge cleaning to maximise coverage at edges and corners. Furthermore, combined with an enhanced sensory algorithm and the brand-new TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor, the continuously variable roller mop can adapt to different types of edges and turns, precisely avoiding collisions while remaining close to edges. In addition, the side brush is constantly extended on a solid structure to reach blind spots in corners, achieving up to 99% coverage*.
---
Dynamic 18,000Pa Suction Power.
• Powered by an ultra-high-speed fan, the DEEBOT T80 OMNI delivers 18,000 Pa of suction power to achieve breakthrough sweeping and suction performance.
---
New ZeroTangle 3.0 Technology.
• Featuring an upgraded ARClean Anti-Tangle Side Brush and an advanced Triple-V Anti-Tangle Structure. The golden spiral design, combined with a single-prong dual-cluster and inward-curved bristles, effectively prevents hair tangling while enhancing the side brush's cleaning performance. Additionally, the 45° V-shaped bristle configuration prevents hair from becoming trapped on the main brush, while the spiral main brush and comb teeth ensure smooth untangling. Users can enjoy efficient suction, easy maintenance, and immaculate floors with the DEEBOT T80 OMNI.
---
AIVI 3D 3.0 Real-Time Obstacle Avoidance.
• The AIVI 3D 3.0 Omni-Approach Technology, powered by the VLM model, uses deep learning neural network architectures trained billions of times to develop precise object recognition and rapid contour extraction. The front structured light and TruEdge 3D Edge Sensor work in tandem to ensure the robot stays close to obstacles while cleaning edges. Real-time path planning allows the robot to detect sudden environmental changes—such as moving people or animals—and instantly react.
---
Compact but Powerful OMNI Station.
• The newly upgraded OMNI Station features Temperature-Controlled Hot Water Mop Washing 2.0, adjusting the washing temperature to match the room type and dirt level for efficient and energy-saving cleaning. Its 45°C Hot Air Drying system ensures the mop is fully dried in two hours, preventing odours and keeping it fresh. With a 150-day maintenance-free mop washing tray, users can enjoy hands-free convenience for months.
---
Warranty & After-Sales Support
• To register your e-warranty, simply scan the QR code on the warranty card included in your order.
• ECOVACS After-Sales Service Centre: 138 Joo Seng Road, #02-00, Singapore 368361.
• Service Centre Contact: +65 9230 5183 (WhatsApp messages only).
• Your order details will serve as the proof of purchase for warranty claims.

metaData.Key Information:
• Safety Mark: 121578-12.
• Warranty Information: 2-Year Limited Hardware Warranty.

product.description:
- ReverseScrub Technology: One-touch brush roller reversal for effortless tough stain removal.
- Backtrack Water Streak Removal: With a single press, the device automatically retracts to an upright position after shutdown, preventing streaks and water residue. Tineco is proud to pioneer this feature for a truly mess-free experience.
- Flash Charging: Quickly powers up for your next cleaning session.
- SilentDry: Quieter during drying and won’t disturb your rest.
- Caution: Cleaning solution should not be used with Floor One S9 Artist Steam Pro when operating in Steam Mode.

metaData.Key Information:
- 160°C HyperSteam Technology: Delivers consistent high-temperature steam powered by an advanced boiler system that maintains outlet temperatures above 99°C which effortlessly removes tough stains and grease, kills 99.9% of bacteria, and prevents condensation for streak-free, fast-drying results.
- Powerful 25kPa Suction with Extended Runtime: Delivers deep and efficient cleaning with industry-leading 25kPa suction power, offering up to 90 minutes in QUIET mode and 75 minutes in AUTO mode.
- Upgraded Electrolyzed Water for a Deeper Clean: Electrolyzed water enhances cleaning performance, delivering powerful and eco-friendly disinfection in both liquid and vapor forms, effective yet completely safe for people and surfaces.
- Warranty: 2 Years
- Safety Mark: 121578-12

product.description:
• 11000Pa powerful suction for deep carpet cleaning process, leaving no dead zones and achieving a maximum coverage rate of 100% along the edge lines, while maintaining a mop-to-edge distance as low as 1mm.
• Paired with an anti-static V-shaped bristles, it greatly reduces the probability of hair tangling on the main brush, with a tangling rate as low as 0% allowing to conquer obstacles with heights up to 20mm on both dry and wet surfaces, providing users with versatile cleaning capabilities for various home environments.
• The 9mm Auto-lift Mopping System lifts the mopping plates when a carpet is detected.
• DEEBOT T30 Family incorporates TrueDetect 3D 3.0 enabling precise obstacle avoidance with tailored strategies for various objects
• DEEBOT T30 Family features TrueMapping 2.0, ensuring rapid and accurate mapping with the ability to map 100 square meters in just 6 minutes, intelligent path planning for navigating complex scenes.

• Contact FairPrice’s CS Team for any returns, refunds, or exchanges by providing your order number, pictures/ videos of the defect.

• Return & refund will exclude any delivery service charges that the customer had paid for the Product. Service charges, such as delivery and installation fees will not be refunded.
• Once the return is processed or accepted, seller will contact customer to coordinate pickup of the product. Customer must be present at the time of product pickup/exchange to complete the return.
• Items without it's original packaging and complete accessories are not qualified for exchange.
